Fighter type: Tank

Introduced in: Special offer

Rate this item


description 2/6

All enemies within a small radius around the unit have their attack speed reduced by 55%. Also, the cooldown times of those enemies’ artifact abilities are increased by 1 sec.

description 4/6

All enemies within a small radius around the unit have their attack speed reduced by 65%. Also, the cooldown times of those enemies’ artifact abilities are increased by 1,5 sec. The enemy attacking the unit has a 25% chance of being frozen for 1,5 sec. That enemy takes 16% more magic damage for 1,5 sec.

description 6/6

All enemies within a small radius around the unit have their attack speed reduced by 75%. Also, the cooldown times of those enemies’ artifact abilities are increased by 2 sec. The enemy attacking the unit has a 35% chance of being frozen for 2,2 sec. That enemy takes 25% more magic damage for 1,5 sec. When the fighter’s health drops below 40%, the fighter takes 50% less damage, and the allies take 45% less damage. When taking damage done by archers’ or mages’ attacks or abilities, the fighter has a 35% chance of dealing 75% damage to the attackers.


Substance of Chaos

description 2/6

When attacking, Bastion has a 60% chance to freeze the target. While frozen, it is unable to move or attack for 1 sec. Also, the cooldown times of the target’s gear abilities and artifact abilities are increased by 1 sec.

description 4/6

When attacking, Bastion has a 60% chance to freeze the target. While frozen, it is unable to move or attack for 1 sec. Also, the cooldown times of the target’s gear abilities and artifact abilities are increased by 1 sec. When Bastion freezes an enemy who attacked them, that unit also takes 75000 magic damage.

description 6/6

When attacking, Bastion has a 60% chance to freeze the target. While frozen, it is unable to move or attack for 1 sec. Also, the cooldown times of the target’s gear abilities and artifact abilities are increased by 1 sec. When Bastion freezes an enemy who attacked them, that unit also takes 75000 magic damage. All frozen enemies take magic damage equal to 5% of Bastion’s max health every second.


Substance of Greatness

description 2/6

Bastion’s physical armor is increased by 20% for each enemy in a small radius around them. Up to 4 effects.

description 4/6

Bastion’s physical armor is increased by 20% for each enemy in a small radius around them. Up to 4 effects. Bastion’s magic armor is increased by 20% for each enemy in a small radius aronud them. Up to 4 effects.

description 6/6

Bastion’s physical armor is increased by 20% for each enemy in a small radius around them. Up to 4 effects. Bastion’s magic armor is increased by 20% for each enemy in a small radius aronud them. Up to 4 effects. Whenever an enemy is frozen, Bastion’s magic and physical armor increases by 5% for 8 sec. Up to 8 effects.


Substance of Harmony

description 2/6

The recharge time of enemies’ weapon abilities in a small radius around Bastion is also increased by 2 sec.

description 4/6

The recharge time of enemies’ weapon abilities in a small radius around Bastion is also increased by 2 sec. When Bastion freezes an enemy that attacked them, that unit takes 16% more damage (of all types) for 1,5 sec.

description 6/6

The recharge time of enemies’ weapon abilities in a small radius around Bastion is also increased by 2 sec. When Bastion freezes an enemy that attacked them, that unit takes 25% more damage (of all types) for 1,5 sec. When Bastion uses their ability to deal damage to mages or archers, the target of the ability is frozen. This ability is triggered by taking damage from mages or archers. While frozen, targets are unable to move or attack for 2 sec. Also, the cooldown times of the target’s gear abilities and artifact abilities are increased by 2 sec.

Icy Potion
Snowflake
